fields.name: Sign-up URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the web page where you sign up for the document exchange service.

fields.name: Service URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the URL address of the document exchange service. The service specified in the Service URL field is called when you send and receive electronic documents.

fields.name: Sign-in URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the web page where you sign in to the document exchange service.

fields.name: User Agent
fields.tooltip: Specifies any text that you have entered to identify your company in document exchange processes.

fields.name: Client Id
fields.tooltip: Specifies the client ID of the application that will be used to connect to the document exchange service.

fields.name: Redirect URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the redirect URL of the application that will be used to to the document exchange service.

fields.name: Auth URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the authentication URL address of the document exchange service.

fields.name: Token URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the token URL address of the document exchange service.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the service is enabled. When you enable the service, at least two job queue entries are created to process the traffic of electronic documents in and out of Microsoft Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Log Web Requests
fields.tooltip: Specifies if web requests occurring in connection with the service are logged. The log is located in the server Temp folder.

fields.name: Token Issued At
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time at which the token was issued.

fields.name: Token Expired
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the token has expired.
